name: SBI Club Vistara Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 6 CV Points per ₹200 spent on Vistara flight bookings
2 CV Points per ₹200 spent on all other transactions

welcomeBenefits.description: 1 complimentary domestic economy class ticket on Vistara
welcomeBenefits.condition: On card issuance — ticket provided within 30 days

milestoneBenefits.benefit: 1 complimentary Economy class ticket on Vistara
1 complimentary Premium Economy class ticket on Vistara
1 complimentary Business class ticket on Vistara

additionalBenefits: Priority check-in and boarding on Vistara flights
pros: Complimentary Vistara flight ticket on welcome is worth more than the joining fee
Milestone benefits offer progressively better Vistara tickets (Economy to Business class)
Club Vistara Silver membership included for priority boarding and extra baggage
3X accelerated earn rate on Vistara bookings
Low joining fee of ₹1,499 for a travel-focused premium card
cons: Rewards locked into Vistara ecosystem — limited if you fly other airlines
3.5% foreign currency markup is high for a travel card
Base earn rate of 2 CV points per ₹200 is low on non-Vistara spends
idealFor: Frequent Vistara flyers who want to maximize airline-specific rewards
Travelers who value complimentary flight tickets as milestone benefits
Those looking for a co-branded airline card with a low entry fee

faqs.question: How do I get the complimentary welcome flight ticket?
faqs.answer: A complimentary domestic economy class Vistara ticket is issued within 30 days of card issuance. You will receive a voucher code via email that can be used for booking on the Vistara website.

faqs.question: What are the milestone flight ticket benefits?
faqs.answer: You earn complimentary Vistara tickets based on annual spend: Economy ticket at ₹1 lakh, Premium Economy at ₹2 lakh, and Business class at ₹4 lakh spend.

faqs.question: Can I use CV Points on other airlines?
faqs.answer: No, CV Points are exclusively redeemable within the Vistara ecosystem for flights, upgrades, and add-on services. They cannot be transferred to other airline loyalty programs.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee waiver condition?
faqs.answer: The ₹1,499 annual fee is waived if your total annual spends exceed ₹2,00,000 in the previous year.
